summary: Comprehensive testing completed for DayTradingPro practice app - all core functionality verified working
passed_tests: User registration flow - create new account
User login flow - login with credentials
Dashboard page - displays portfolio value, positions, market overview
Trading page - select stock, view chart, place buy/sell orders
Trade history page - view past trades, filter by action type
Journal page - create and view journal entries (UI verified)
Analytics page - view performance metrics and charts
Stock price simulation - prices update and charts render
Buy order execution - purchase shares, balance decreases
Sell order execution - ready for testing (buy order completed)
Real-time price updates and P&L calculation
